logic_gaps.description: 4 thresholds in references/convergence.md §1 Key Defaults (rollingStopThreshold 0.08, noProgressThreshold 0.05, minStabilizationPasses 1, compositeStopScore 0.60) are documented as global defaults but only present in assets/review_mode_contract.yaml (lines 141-145), not in assets/deep_review_config.json. Likely intentional split (yaml=static contract, json=per-instance state) but convergence.md doesn't clarify the surface where each default lives. DOWNGRADED P1→P2 after cross-verification: pattern is design-correct, only the doc clarity is at issue.

Security-Sensitive Fix Overrides documented in references/convergence.md §Security-Sensitive Fix Overrides (lines 66-76) promise three behaviors: minStabilizationPasses=2, requiredClosedFindingReplay=true, requiredFixCompletenessGate=true. Verification: requiredClosedFindingReplay and requiredFixCompletenessGate have ZERO matches across config.json, yaml, and reduce-state.cjs (1657 LOC). minStabilizationPasses appears in yaml (line 141) only as the general default (=1), not as the security-sensitive override (=2). Runtime literally cannot apply the override convergence.md documents. Operators reading the docs would assume automatic override; in reality, the override does nothing. **P0: documented behavior with no implementation surface.**

novel_findings: iter 4 surfaces the first P0 of phase 5. LG-0022 is a documentation-promise-no-implementation gap: convergence.md describes an automatic security-sensitive override that the runtime cannot apply.

Resolution path for LG-0022 has 2 options: (a) implement the override in reducer (out of scope per ADR-002 — defer to follow-on) OR (b) rewrite convergence.md §Security-Sensitive Fix Overrides to mark the section as 'SPEC ONLY / future implementation' (in scope; doc edit only). Option B is appropriate for this packet.
Cross-verification confirmed the agent's claim. yaml has minStabilizationPasses=1 as general default; the security-sensitive value (=2) and the 2 boolean flags exist nowhere.
notes: Iter 4 RQ: convergence-defaults drift docs vs config vs yaml vs code. Wall-clock 135s. 2 novel gaps. LG-0021 downgraded P1→P2 after main-agent cross-verification (thresholds split is design-correct). LG-0022 P0 confirmed via grep across config/yaml/reducer — security-sensitive override has no runtime implementation.
